search.title: User search
search.subtitle: Find a user to view or impersonate. Platform admins cannot be impersonated.
search.label: Search by name, email, or ULID
search.load_failed: We couldn't search users. Please try again.

impersonate.title: Impersonate {name}
impersonate.warning: You will open a new tab signed in AS this user. Your admin session stays active here. Every action you take is recorded against this user with you logged as the impersonator, and the session expires automatically.
impersonate.reason_hint: Required, at least {count} characters. Recorded in the audit log.
impersonate.success: Impersonation of {name} started in a new tab.
impersonate.failed: We couldn't start impersonation. Please try again.

impersonation_log.title: Impersonation log
impersonation_log.subtitle: Every admin impersonation session ever started, newest first.
impersonation_log.empty: No impersonation sessions match these filters.
impersonation_log.load_failed: We couldn't load the impersonation log. Please refresh.

impersonation.already_active: You already have an active impersonation. End it before starting another.
impersonation.invalid_handoff: This impersonation hand-off is invalid, already used, or expired.
